# Sarthi

> An AI maths tutor for CBSE and JEE. Sarthi teaches maths bottom-up — chapter by chapter, concept by
> concept — checking understanding at each step, then sets a full past board paper. Built so the gaps that
> usually pile up never form. Free to start; unlimited with membership.

Sarthi covers maths for CBSE Class 10, CBSE Class 12 (mathematics), and JEE. Chapters unlock in order; within
a chapter, concepts unlock one at a time (locked → open → passed). An AI tutor teaches each concept, gates it
with a quick check, re-teaches on a miss, and only then opens the next. After the chapters, the learner sits a
real past board paper and sees which concepts to revise.

## Key pages
- [Full syllabus](https://bottom-up-web.onrender.com/learn/): chapter-wise maths syllabus across three tracks
  — CBSE Class 10 maths, CBSE Class 12 mathematics, JEE maths. Each track at /learn/<track>/ and each chapter
  at /learn/<track>/<chapter>/.
- [Why Sarthi](https://bottom-up-web.onrender.com/why-sarthi.html): the bottom-up idea — start at the foundation, build upward.
- [How it works](https://bottom-up-web.onrender.com/how-it-works.html): the teach → gate → exam loop.
- [Home](https://bottom-up-web.onrender.com/): start learning.

## About
- Audience: Indian students preparing CBSE Class 10 & 12 maths and JEE maths.
- Language: English.
- Note: the interactive AI tutor is a JavaScript app behind a sign-in. The public /learn pages are the
  crawlable syllabus (chapter + concept titles and briefs); the full lessons are in the app.
